nasb.text: New gods were chosen; Then war was in the gates. Not a shield or a spear was seen Among forty thousand in Israel.

esv.text: When new gods were chosen, then war was in the gates. Was shield or spear to be seen among forty thousand in Israel?

cnv.text: 以色列人選擇了新的神， 戰爭就臨近城門； 那時四萬以色列人中， 竟不見有一面盾牌、一枝長矛。

ccb.text: 以色列人选择新的神明， 便战祸临门， 四万以色列人中找不到一矛一盾。
